text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start

g.text: Figure 4. Baseline comparison across retrieval methods

text.style: font-size: 9px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #1f2937

g.text: Baseline E modestly improves overall and citation metrics while preserving Baseline A as the reference point.
